plang.note: All 5 failures are pre-existing and deferred (3 builder onError, 1 NullRef in condition eval, 1 wrong assertion in .pr)

findings.issue: Names property was missing setup filter — inconsistent with Get/All/Count
findings.impact: Setup goals would leak into Names enumeration
findings.status: FIXED — code fix + Names_ExcludesSetupGoals test added

findings.issue: Empty Path bypassed enforcement — PrPath computed '.build\.pr' for empty string
findings.impact: Garbage key would be added to goals dictionary
findings.suggestion: Change Path null check to string.IsNullOrEmpty(Path) in PrPath getter
findings.status: FIXED — code fix + Add_ThrowsWhenPathIsEmptyString test added

findings.issue: Add() checks goal.PrPath but error says 'must have a Path set' — functionally correct but semantically misleading
findings.impact: Low — developer confusion only, no runtime impact
findings.suggestion: Check goal.Path instead of goal.PrPath in Add() for clarity

summary: All tester v2 must-fix findings (#9, #10) are resolved with correct code fixes and honest tests. 1511/1511 C# tests pass (up from 1509). PLang tests: 59/64 pass, all 5 failures are pre-existing/deferred. Finding #11 (minor semantic mislabeling) remains unfixed but is acceptable. No new findings. No regressions.
